message.content:
Review the repost/quote-repost feature implementation across these files for bugs, logic errors, and missing pieces. Focus on:
1. Backend service logic in server/services/interactService.js (the repostService function near line 238)
2. Frontend PostCards.jsx - check the repost card rendering and repost icon button logic
3. Frontend ContentView.jsx - check the repost button and modal integration
4. RepostModal component at client/src/components/RepostModal/RepostModal.jsx

The project root is C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3

content.text: I'll read all the relevant files in parallel to get a comprehensive view of the repost/quote-repost implementation.
Now let me look at the API layer and mutation hook for repost, and also check if `repost_source` is actually fetched from the backend.
Now let me check the backend route for repost and the journals query to verify how `repost_source` is joined.
